title: Let Mut
description: Declare a mutable variable using the 'mut' keyword to allow its value to change.
problemStatement:
Variables are immutable by default! Declare a variable `x` with an initial value of `5`, then change its value to `10`. Print the final value of `x`.

**Requirement:** Use the `mut` keyword in your declaration.
hints: Without `mut`, trying to re-assign a value to `x` will result in a compiler error.
